english translation text: Tu ath’wa mushkil kush, noore Janab e SayyedaYou are the eight saviour, the light of Bibi Fatima (s.a.) English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Tu ath’wa mushkil kush, noore Janab e Sayyeda
@HujjatELC
english translation text: You are the eight saviour, the light of Bibi Fatima (s.a.)

urdu transliteration text:
Maula tu Imam Zamin haiTere qabze mei raat hai din haiTu khurasan ka hai shehzadahar shifa tere dar pe mumkin hai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Oh my Imam, You are my protector
The day and the night are in your control
You are the prince of Khorasan (Mashhad)
Every cure can be found at your door step

Your father is Babul Hawaij (the one who answers wishes)
We will endure all trials and He is the one who provide results

Your Grandfather is Imam Sadiq (a.s.)
Spreading knowledge is a form of worship
May we get protection under his door

The miracles of Imam Ali (a.s.) are present in you
And you provide to the poor & needy
This is an intrinsic part of your nature

urdu transliteration text:
Teri behna hai Qum ki ShehzadiUski Chawkhat pe de sada jo bhiJoliya apno bhar ke laata haiGhamse milti hai usko aazadi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Your sister is the princess of Qum
Whoever makes a requests at her shrine, returns with full of blessings and is freed from all grief

urdu transliteration text:
Hai najaf dushmano ke narge maiKarbala Samara ke raste maiBekafan momino ke laashe haiKufr daakhil hwa madina mai
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Najaf is surrounded by enemies
On the road to Karbala and Samarra, the bodies of the believers are without shrouds and the non believers have entered Medina
